title: Pattern
description: A structural entity that captures a recurring phenomenon observed across ≥2 regions (P8 — type-defining minimum). National rollup projections on /research/nz/ are rendered from Pattern nodes; the rendering-layer threshold (≥10 regions) is NOT encoded here per ratified decision §5.6. A node manifesting in only one region is an Instance (a Claim), not a Pattern.

manifests_in.description: Regions where this Pattern is observed. ≥2 required (P8 intra-entity check, JSON-Schema-expressible). Materialises to E_manifests_in.

claim_ids.description: Claims evidencing this Pattern. ≥1 required (P8). Materialises to E_evidenced_by.

narrative.description: Structured narrative sections rendered on the Pattern page.

figure.description: Figure identifier cross-referenced in body (P15 applies if figures list is present).
